title: 串题的串词你可以提前读一下，但是我更建议你在具体的回答中熟悉。因为你直接背串词是碎片的，会很痛苦，而你从故事里面记会更自然，并且你会发现，同样的情节都是用这些话，所以会记忆得更快
b
因为想省钱坐廉航，在办理回家登机手续时，我们发现行李严重超重，必须支付一大笔超重费。我朋友立刻想到一个聪明办法：让我多穿上几条裤子，几件T恤和外套，把重物塞进背包，完美避开超重费！
b

，单单这一季话题，一个新加坡串了26道题，所以建议可以熟悉一下背景故事中对新加坡的简要描述，为你省下不少时间。
So, the city I want to talk about is Singapore. It’s located in Southeast Asia, and honestly, it’s one of the cleanest and most modern cities I’ve ever been to.
b

I went there last summer. You know, there is a visa waiver policy between China and Singapore, so traveling there felt much more convenient. I remember thinking that it was a perfect chance to take a short trip and see what Singapore was really like.
b

Honestly, I really admire her. Traveling with her made me feel much more relaxed and less stressed. I’m the kind of person who just goes with the flow and figures things out later, so having someone like her around was a huge help. She made the whole trip smoother and more efficient, and being with her made me feel safe and taken care of.
b

Honestly, this park feels like a small sanctuary to me. Every time I go there, I feel a sense of peace. It cuts out the noise of the city and gives me a quiet space to slow down. I usually just walk around, enjoy the scenery, or sit somewhere and watch the light change. It is an ideal place to recharge when I feel tired or stressed.
b

She plans almost everything in advance. Before the trip even started, she had already checked the routes, looked up the metro lines, and roughly planned how much time we should spend at each place. Every morning, she would remind us when to leave the hotel, which attraction to visit first, and how to get there in the most efficient way. She also always had a backup plan ready, so it felt like she was already one step ahead of the situation.
b

I stayed there for about five days. I think it was just enough time to explore the main parts of the city without feeling too rushed. Of course, there were still many places I didn’t get to visit, but overall, the trip felt quite fulfilling.

，不至于像你描述一个考官没听过的国内城市，风险很大，你说完考官能想象出来，证明你水平可以。但是大部分同学描述完考官都很难想象出来。所以这里我选了新加坡，至少你在说的时候考官能根据你说的在记忆中找到对应的东西，
避免一些因为我们描述的问题造成考官无法理解的情况

另外有一些题比如擅长做计划的人，助人为乐的人之类的，为了让故事更生动，帮你多拿分，我串到了这个故事而不是名校表妹那里，下面有一些人物描述的串词

The whole trip made me feel relaxed, energized, and inspired.
